desc: Validation gates for roadmap completion: artifact existence, TypeScript compilation, schema validation, hash verification. Task #5 implementation.

implement-artifact-gates.desc: Implement ArtifactGates class: checkExists(), checkTypecheck(), checkSchema() (stub), checkHash() (stub), validateBeforeCompletion()

test-artifact-gates.desc: Write comprehensive test suite: artifact-exists (6 tests), artifact-typecheck (5 tests), integration (4 tests), error handling (3 tests). ~18 total tests, 90%+ coverage.

validate-gates-integration.desc: Run artifact-gates test suite, verify all tests pass, validate 90%+ coverage. Ensure gates are deterministic and error messages are actionable.
